name: console-in-src detector migrated to llm-judge with grep fallback preserves grep behavior when LLM_JUDGE=0
command: mkdir -p /tmp/cl-musk-fowler-src && printf 'console.log("hello")\n' > /tmp/cl-musk-fowler-src/bad.js; rc1=0; LLM_JUDGE=0 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/console-in-src.sh" --paths "/tmp/cl-musk-fowler-src/*.js" 2>err.txt; rc1=$?; rc2=0; LLM_JUDGE=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/console-in-src.sh" --paths "/tmp/cl-musk-fowler-src/*.js" 2>err2.txt; rc2=$?; rm -rf /tmp/cl-musk-fowler-src; [ "$rc1" -eq 1 ] && [ "$rc2" -le 1 ] && echo migration_compatible 1>&2
